bird.name: Abyssinian thrush
bird.summary: The Abyssinian thrush (Turdus abyssinicus) is a passerine bird in the family Turdidae. It is also known as the African mountain thrush, or…

locations.name: 莫桑比克
locations.summary: 莫桑比克共和国（葡萄牙語：República de Moçambique，發音：[ʁɛˈpuβlikɐ ðɨ musɐ̃ˈbikɨ]），舊譯作莫三鼻給，現通稱莫三比克或莫桑比克，位於非洲東部，临印度洋，隔莫桑比克海峡与马达加斯加相望，以葡…

relations.subject: Abyssinian thrush
relations.evidence: The Abyssinian thrush occurs in the highlands of eastern Africa from South Sudan south to northern Mozambique. Its habitat includes forests woodlands, exotic plantations, parks and gardens. This species is a typical member of the genus Turdus but its habits and biology have been little studied, as it was considered to be a subspecies of olive thrush
